title: Vanilla Client Side
description: The ultimate client-side modpack for playing on any Vanilla server. Huge FPS boost, useful visual tools, and QoL improvements without changing game mechanics.
body:
# 📃 **Vanilla Client Side**  
*A performance-first, information-rich client pack for Paper & vanilla servers*

---

## 🌟 Why this pack exists

Most “FPS + visuals” packs chase eye-candy shaders.  
**Vanilla Paper Edition** has a different target audience:

> **❶ Keep the frames high** (Sodium, Lithium, etc.)  
> **❷ Show more useful data** (food saturation, tool durability, redstone power, light levels…)  
> **❸ Stay visually vanilla** — just clearer GUIs & icons, no cinematic post-processing.

It started while speed-running redstone builds on public Paper servers where shaders are pointless but extra on-screen info is gold.

---

## 🔑 What’s inside & why

| Theme | Key components | What you’ll see in-game |
|-------|---------------|-------------------------|
| **Smooth FPS** | Sodium + Indium, Lithium, Starlight, FerriteCore | 2-3 × higher average frames and faster world joins. |
| **Informative UI** | *Resource packs:* Vanilla Tweaks GUI, Redstone Tweaks, Vanilla Experience+ | Cleaner menus, colored potion icons, power-level textures on redstone dust, clearer item durability. |
| **HUD Data** | AppleSkin, Inventory HUD+, Lighty overlays, BetterF3 | Food saturation bars, armor/tool durability, block light level, clearer F3 menu. |
| **Quality of Life** | MouseTweaks, ChestTracker, Dynamic Lights, Dynamic FPS, Clumps | One-click inventory sorting, handheld torches light caves, laptop fans go silent on the title screen. |
| **Navigation** | Xaero’s Minimap + World Map (toggleable) | Waypoints & death markers for builders / explorers. |
| **100 % Client-Side** | Fabric API, Cloth Config, owo-lib | Joins any vanilla, Spigot or Paper server out of the box. |

---

## ⚠️ Server-policy notes

| Mod | What it changes | Possible rule conflicts |
|-----|-----------------|-------------------------|
| **BactroMod** | Full-bright gamma, hides fog, fire & pumpkin overlay | Some PvP/adventure servers ban full-bright & no-fog — toggle these off if disallowed. |
| **Xaero’s Minimap / World Map** | Entity radar & cave mode | If minimaps are restricted, switch to **[Xaero’s Minimap – Fair-Play Edition](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap-fair)** (no entity/cave radar). |

*When in doubt, ask staff or disable the features from the in-game config.*

---

## 💬 Philosophy

- **Performance first** – every addition is benchmarked; anything costing >≈5 FPS is culled.  
- **Information over decoration** – clearer textures & GUIs, not cinematic shaders.  
- **Server friendly** – no cheats, x-ray or automation helpers; just clarity and comfort.

---

Credits:

Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/

Happy crafting & see you on the (Paper) server!
